title: Evasive Action
content: {{Top|rwm|imp|italics=1}} {{ComicSeries |no_image=1 |title=''Evasive Action'' |writer=[[Paul Ens]]{{SWArchive|url=hyperspace/about/news/news20061016.html|text=Evasive Action's ''End Game'' to be Revealed}} |penciller=[[Tom Hodges]] |inker= |letterer= |colorist= |cover artist= |editor= |publisher= |start date=October [[2004]]{{Hyperspace|url=hyperspace/member/episode-iii/bts/setdiary/news20050729.html|series=Episode III Set Diary|text=The Space Battle on Paper}} |end date= |schedule= |format= |issues= |timeline= |series= |preceded by= |followed by= }} '''''Evasive Action''''' was a series of [[Star Wars comic books|webstrips]] published exclusively on [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|''Hyperspace'']], beginning in October [[2004]] and ending in November [[2006]]. Together they chronicle the events of three [[Padawan/Legends|Padawans]] who go from fighting [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatists]] on [[Felucia/Legends|Felucia]], to fugitives on the run from the newly formed [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. ==List of webstrips {{SectionFlag}}== *''[[Reversal of Fortune]]'' *''[[Evasive Action: Recruitment]]'' *''[[Evasive Action: Prey]]'' *''[[Evasive Action: End Game]]'' {{Comics-stub}} ==Sources== {{Mediacat|from=1|imagecat=Images from Evasive Action}} *{{Hyperspace|url=hyperspace/member/episode-iii/bts/setdiary/news20050729.html|series=Episode III Set Diary|text=The Space Battle on Paper}} *{{SWArchive|url=hyperspace/about/news/news20060303.html|text=Webstrip Update: ''Evasive Action: Prey''}} *{{SWArchive|url=hyperspace/about/news/news20061016.html|text=Evasive Action's ''End Game'' to be Revealed}} *{{SW|url=news/the-other-lost-missions-rare-clone-wars-comics-and-literature-part-1|text=Rare Clone Wars Comics and Literature, Part 1|nolive=1}} *{{SW|url=series/obi-wan-kenobi/part-iii-guide|text=Part III Episode Guide | Obi-Wan Kenobi}} {{Imo}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Evasive Action#legends |es=Evasive Action |ka=თავის არიდების ქმედება }} [[Category:Webstrips]]
